Notice Of Motion To Strike Answer Of Walter A. Varakin Ind And As Executor Of The Estate Of Augusta A. Varakin, Memorandum Of P/A Filed
Off Calendar May-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Epstein, Esq., EPSTEIN GROUP, (415) 863-5718 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Kathleen Crowley. Walter A. Varakin, (415) 431-4450, defendant appeared in propria persona.

After argument plaintiff Kathleen Crowley's Motion to Strike Answer of Walter Varakin individually and as executor was granted with ten (10) days leave to amend. Request for entry of default was denied. Defendant shall only appear in this matter in his representative capacity as executor through counsel. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer And Cross-Complt Filed By Walter A. Varakin On Dec 24, O1 Memo P/A
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark Epstein, Esq. 863-5718 for Plaintiff KATHLEEN CROWLEY moving to strike the Answer and the Cross-Complaint
Defendant WALTER A. VARAKIN in propria persona 916/929-6940 also as the Executor of the Esate of Augusta A. Varakin, deceased opposing party

Argued and the Court granted Plaintiff's motion to strike. Mr. Varakin has 10 days in which to file a single Answer in both capacities as an individual and a personal representative of the estate. However, the estate must appear through counsel. If this is not done within the time specified, then this Court will strike the second Answer. (JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
